creator: reezer@reezer.org
text:
I think the main use case of the port is so people who want different options than www/nginx can install a package, rather than self compiling. Anyways, that is mine.

So the pre-built package didn't exist for a while now.

https://portsfallout.com/fallout?port=www%2Fnginx-full%24

In other words, we're talking about the default settings.
